page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web-based semi-de novo fast virus genome assembly pipeline designed for extremely high coverage NGS data. It is a collection of existing tools, combined into a single Galaxy interface. Users without further computational knowledge can easily operate the pipeline.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web-based semi-de novo fast virus genome assembly pipeline designed for extremely high coverage NGS data. It is a collection of existing tools, combined into a single Galaxy interface. Users without further computational knowledge can easily operate the pipeline.
